onboarding.consentTitle: Shoma ebyahi byawe, aha simu yaawe
onboarding.consentBody: BorrowWise neeshoma obubaka bwa MoKash na Wewole aha simu egi kukworeka buri cyahi oku kirikugura, n'okukurabura otakaba noobanzibwa munonga. Tihariho ekirikuheebwa hatariho okwikiriza kwawe.

loan.repaymentsHint: Ebi washashwiire, n'ebisigaireho enyima ya buri kushashura.
loan.thinkTwiceBody: Ekiwabyo eki n'ecy'omuhendo gwa haiguru kandi nikiruga aha muhaisi otari aha rukalara rwa layisinsi rwa UMRA.

Stable.headline: Ori omu mbeera nungi
Stable.nudge: Okushashura kwawe nikureeba nk'okurikubaasika. Haina eki orikubaasa kushashura.

Emerging Risk.headline: Obumanyiso bw'akabi nikaija
Emerging Risk.nudge: Ebibanja byawe nibyeyongyera. Teekateeka aha kutandika kuruga aha kuhaina ebihyaka.

High Risk.headline: Akabi k'okubanzibwa munonga
High Risk.nudge: Okutwara ecyahi eki nikibaasa kukuhingura aha eki orikubaasa kushashura. Gamba n'omuhaisi waawe otakaba noyongyera kuhaina.

settings.title: Enteekateeka
settings.appLockDesc: Saba orukumu nari PIN kwiguraho app

safer.sub: Oburemeezi n'obw'amazima — kwonka ecyahi cy'omuhendo gwa haiguru ecya sabbiiti ibiri nikibaasa kukwongyera. Emiringo mirungi okubanza:

licensed.d: Nafugwa UMRA/BoU aha mihendo eine ekikomo.

less.d: UGX 100k aha nnaku 7 n'ehendo nkye kukira 200k aha nnaku 30.

wait.d: N'ennaku 3 nizibaasa kureeta omushaara nari omuringo gw'ehendo nkye.

mokash.d: Kuhika aha UGX 250,000 · ~9% · teera *165#. Shashura omu nnaku 30, ti 14.

sacco.d: Omuhendo gw'abanyamwe, kandi nibakutegyereza haaba habaireho enyima.

tc.lede: Nooza kwikiriza app y'ecyahi? Ta hano ebiragiro byayo nanye ninkworeka buri kabi omu rurimi orworobi.
tc.placeholder: Ta hano ebiragiro bya app y'ecyahi…
tc.stubNote: Okucheeka kw'okworekaho. Ekituufu nikishoma ebiragiro bya app kandi kikabicondooza na AI.

result.summary: Ecyahi eki nikigura nka 30% buri sabbiiti — kuhingura 300% omu mwaka. Nikibaasa kutwara abo bo aha simu n'ebishushani, kwiha esente aha MoMo hatariho kubuuza, n'okugabana ebikukwataho n'‘abakora nabo’. Otakikiriza.

f1.w: N'obundi 320,000 kugarurayo aha cyahi cya 200,000 omu sabbiiti ibiri — haiguru munonga aha kikomo ekitegyekiirwe.

f2.c: Nooha obushobozi aha bo bo, ebyayogyerwaho n'ebishushani
f2.w: Nibikozesibwa kukusherereza n'okukuswaza (n'ab'omu maka gaawe) waaba washwija.

f3.c: Nooikiriza kwihibwaho esente omu muringo gw'okwekorera aha MoMo
f3.w: Nibabaasa kwihaho esente obwire bwona haabaho ekisigaireho, n'ez'ebyokurya nari obupangisa.

f4.c: Ebikukwataho nibibaasa kugabanwa n'abantu abandi ‘abakora nabo’
f4.w: Obwakyo bwawe n'okuhaina bikaguzibwa hatariho kwikiriza kw'amazima.

band.fair: Wa hagati — hariho ei orikubaasa kuhindura

score.builtTitle: Kyombekirwe kuruga aha simu yaawe — omu kyama
score.privacy: Ebbara egi n'eyaawe. Neombekirwe aha simu yaawe kuruga aha byafaayo byawe eby'esente za MoMo — abahaisi tibagireeba kihango ku orikwikiriza kugabana.

safe.canBorrow: Norikubaasa kuhaina omu bugume kuhika aha
safe.at: omu nnaku ~30, aha muhendo gw'amazima ahansi ya {{pct}}%
safe.lay: Omu rurimi orworobi: eki nikiguma ebishashurwa ahansi y'ekicweka kya kashatu ky'empiiho yaawe — kandi noorikubaasa kushashura ebyokurya, obupangisa n'airtime. Waahaina ekirikukira weeteeka omu kabi.

chat.greeting: Oraire ota — nyowe ndi Sente. Mbuuza kyona aha byahi nari esente zaawe, hatariho kucwera musango. Nkuhwere nta?
chat.rescueOpener: Nakuyemeza otakaba noza omu {{app}}. Noyenda esente aha ki? Hatariho kucwera musango — reka tusherûre omuringo murungi. 🤝

reply.greeting: Ndi hanu. Ngambira ekirikubaho aha sente nanye ndikuhwera — hatariho kucwera musango.
reply.askAmount: Ninkuhurira — oburemeezi obu n'obw'amazima. Noyenda esente zingahi, kandi ryari?
reply.recommend: Webare. Kurugiirira aha sente ezirikwija aha simu yaawe, norikubaasa kutwara ecyahi kikye eky'obwire obukye. Hanu hariho ebiicweka birungi kukira app etaine layisinsi:
reply.afford: Guma ebishashurwa ahansi y'ekicweka kya kashatu ky'empiiho yaawe ya buri mwezi — aha byafaayo byawe eki n'nka UGX 220,000 omu nnaku 30 aha muhendo gw'amazima. Noyenda ninkworeka ekirikugyendana?
reply.licensed: Abahaisi abaine layisinsi bari aha rukalara rwa UMRA / Bank of Uganda — emihendo eine ekikomo, tihariho kusherereza. App ezitaine layisinsi nizikira kusaba 60%+ zikatwara abo bo. Ngambira app nanye ndikucheeka.

understand.headline: Wahaine {{amount}}. Noza kushashura {{repay}} — eki n'{{extra}} ez'okwongyera omu nnaku {{days}}.
understand.perDay: N'nka UGX {{perDay}} buri izooba ei orikushashura kukwata esente egi.
understand.late: Waashwija eizooba, ebihano nibibaasa kweyongyera juba — emirundi mingi kukira amagoba gonyini.
understand.early: Waashashura juba nosigaza kukira — tihariho mpeera y'okurindira.
understand.coach: Tori mubi aha sente — okumanya omuhendo gw'amazima nikwo kukuguma omu buyinza. 👏

danger.title: Rinda — {{app}} neebaasa kukutega
danger.f1: Amagoba maingi aga buri izooba agarikweyongyera juba
danger.f2: Ebisiisa ebishishirwe, nibyorekwa waaba wamara kwikiriza
danger.understandSub: Gamba na Sente — tunga ecyahi cy'amazima

contrib.countSub: abahaisi bakengire abandi omwezi ogu — ori omwe ahari bo
contrib.sentSub: Tihariho ekiruga aha simu yaawe otakateeraho. Iwe ori omu buyinza.
contrib.share1: Omuhendo gwonka — nk'"obumanyiso 12 aha Ezee Credit, Kampala"
contrib.share2: Okworekwa kurugiirira aha disitulikiti — tihariho maziina, bubaka, nari byahi
contrib.share3: Bikungaanisibwa n'enkumi → Bank of Uganda na UMRA
contrib.privacy: Obwakyo bwawe, SMS zawe n'ebyahi byawe tibiruga aha simu — omuhendo gwonka ogutaine maziina niigwo gurugaho.

banned.title: App y'ecyahi embi eri aha simu yaawe
banned.reason: Teri aha rukalara rwa layisinsi rwa UMRA — app nk'ezi nizibaasa kukutega omu bbanja, ebisiisa ebishishirwe n'okusherereza.
